title: The Long Indoors
leftText: During the great lockdowns of 2020, the world shrank to the size of a window. Inside one apartment tower in a city under curfew, ordinary people learned to live an entire life within four walls — and discovered that isolation is not the same as being alone.
rightText: By Priya Menon · 5 stories so far. Add your chapter to this living universe.

title: Chahamana Legacy
leftText: 1191 CE. One arrow changes everything. When Prithviraj Chauhan's arrow finds Muhammad of Ghor at the First Battle of Tarain, the conquest of Bharat never comes. Nalanda never burns.
rightText: By Veda Vyasa · 2 stories so far. Add your chapter to this living universe.

title: Exodus 2120
leftText: The world is ending. Some of humanity escapes on generational starships bound for new planetary systems. These are the stories of those who did — and those left behind. Explore themes of survival, identity, and what it means to be human when everything familiar is lost.
rightText: By Meera Rao · 2 stories so far. Add your chapter to this living universe.
